source: description:"Provide domain-specific knowledge and workflows for the agent"
target: description:"为智能体提供特定领域的知识和工作流"

source: label:"Include third-party Plugins, Skills, and other configs",description:"Automatically import agent configs from other tools"
target: label:"包含第三方插件、技能和其他配置",description:"自动从其他工具导入智能体配置"

source: title:"Rules",helpTooltipLabel:"Learn about Rules",helpLink:"https://cursor.com/docs/context/rules",description:"Use Rules to guide agent behavior, like enforcing best practices or coding standards. Rules can be applied always, by file path, or manually."
target: title:"规则",helpTooltipLabel:"了解规则",helpLink:"https://cursor.com/docs/context/rules",description:"使用规则来引导智能体行为，例如强制执行最佳实践或编码规范。规则可以始终应用、按文件路径应用，或手动应用。"

source: title:"Skills",helpTooltipLabel:"Learn about Skills",helpLink:"https://cursor.com/docs/context/skills",description:"Skills are specialized capabilities that help the agent accomplish specific tasks. Skills will be invoked by the agent when relevant or can be triggered manually with / in chat."
target: title:"技能",helpTooltipLabel:"了解技能",helpLink:"https://cursor.com/docs/context/skills",description:"技能是帮助智能体完成特定任务的专门能力。技能会在相关时由智能体调用，也可以在聊天中通过 / 手动触发。"

source: title:"Subagents",helpTooltipLabel:"Learn about Subagents",helpLink:"https://cursor.com/docs/agent/subagents",description:"Create specialized agents for complex tasks. Subagents can be invoked by the agent to handle focused work in parallel."
target: title:"子智能体",helpTooltipLabel:"了解子智能体",helpLink:"https://cursor.com/docs/agent/subagents",description:"为复杂任务创建专门的智能体。子智能体可由主智能体调用，以并行处理聚焦工作。"

source: idToScrollTo:YFw,title:"Commands",helpTooltipLabel:"Learn about Commands",helpLink:"https://cursor.com/docs/agent/chat/commands",description:"Create reusable workflows triggered with / prefix in chat. Use commands to standardize processes and make common tasks more efficient."
target: idToScrollTo:YFw,title:"命令",helpTooltipLabel:"了解命令",helpLink:"https://cursor.com/docs/agent/chat/commands",description:"创建可在聊天中通过 / 前缀触发的可复用工作流。使用命令来标准化流程，并让常见任务更高效。"

source: title:"No Subagents Yet",description:"Create specialized agents to handle focused tasks",get actionTitle(){return n.canCreateContextualContent?"New Subagent":void 0}
target: title:"还没有子智能体",description:"创建专门的智能体来处理聚焦任务",get actionTitle(){return n.canCreateContextualContent?"新建子智能体":void 0}

source: title:"No Rules Yet",description:"Create rules to guide Agent behavior",get actionTitle(){return n.canCreateUserContent?"New User Rule":n.hasWorkspaceScopeSelected?"New Project Rule":void 0}
target: title:"还没有规则",description:"创建规则来引导智能体行为",get actionTitle(){return n.canCreateUserContent?"新建用户规则":n.hasWorkspaceScopeSelected?"新建项目规则":void 0}

source: title:"No Skills Yet",description:"Skills help the agent accomplish specific tasks",get actionTitle(){return n.canCreateContextualContent?"New Skill":void 0}
target: title:"还没有技能",description:"技能可帮助智能体完成特定任务",get actionTitle(){return n.canCreateContextualContent?"新建技能":void 0}

source:
Privacy Mode (Legacy)
No training and no storage. Background Agent and other features that require code storage will be disabled.
target:
隐私模式（旧版）
不训练且不存储。后台智能体和其他需要代码存储的功能将被禁用。

target: get description(){return["隐私模式（旧版）已启用。后台智能体和部分功能不可用。",

target: description:"基于最近编辑，在光标附近提供上下文感知的多行建议"

function bKC(n){switch(n){case .85:return"小";case 1:return"默认";case 1.15:return"大";case 1.3:return"超大";default:return n}}

source: description:"Custom keywords that trigger auto-submit in voice mode. Only single words (no spaces) are allowed. Punctuation and capitalization are ignored."

target: n.notificationService.warn("语音模式的提交关键词必须是不含空格或标点的单个词；重复项、空格和空条目会被自动移除")

source: RUN_EVERYTHING_SANDBOX_AVAILABLE:"This allows the agent to execute any tool or shell command without approval. A prompt injection or a malicious tool could delete files or exfiltrate secrets from your machine. We recommend using Sandbox."
target: RUN_EVERYTHING_SANDBOX_AVAILABLE:"这会允许智能体无需批准即可执行任何工具或 shell 命令。提示注入或恶意工具可能会删除文件或从你的机器泄露机密。建议使用沙箱。"

source: RUN_EVERYTHING_SANDBOX_UNAVAILABLE:"This allows the agent to execute any tool or shell command without approval. A prompt injection or a malicious tool could delete files or exfiltrate secrets from your machine. We recommend using Allowlist."
target: RUN_EVERYTHING_SANDBOX_UNAVAILABLE:"这会允许智能体无需批准即可执行任何工具或 shell 命令。提示注入或恶意工具可能会删除文件或从你的机器泄露机密。建议使用允许列表。"

source: get description(){return`Apply .cursorignore files to all subdirectories${n.reactiveStorageService.applicationUserPersistentStorage.teamAdminSettings?.cursorIgnore?.hierarchicalEnabled?" (controlled by admin)":""}. Changing this setting will require a restart of Cursor.`}
target: get description(){return`将 .cursorignore 文件应用到所有子目录${n.reactiveStorageService.applicationUserPersistentStorage.teamAdminSettings?.cursorIgnore?.hierarchicalEnabled?"（由管理员控制）":""}。更改此设置后需要重启 Cursor。`}

source: label:"Ignore Symlinks in Cursor Ignore Search"
target: label:"在 Cursor Ignore 搜索中忽略符号链接"

source: get description(){return`⚠️ Use with caution. Skip symlinks during .cursorignore file discovery. Only enable if your repository has many symlinks and all .cursorignore files are reachable without them${n.reactiveStorageService.applicationUserPersistentStorage.teamAdminSettings?.cursorIgnore?.ignoreSymlinks?" (controlled by admin)":""}. Changing this setting will require a restart of Cursor.`}
target: get description(){return`⚠️ 请谨慎使用。在发现 .cursorignore 文件时跳过符号链接。仅当你的仓库包含大量符号链接，且所有 .cursorignore 文件都无需通过它们即可访问时再启用${n.reactiveStorageService.applicationUserPersistentStorage.teamAdminSettings?.cursorIgnore?.ignoreSymlinks?"（由管理员控制）":""}。更改此设置后需要重启 Cursor。`}

source: se=We(()=>{const Ne=l();return Ne.isDisabledByAdmin?"Auto-Run Mode Disabled by Team Admin":Ne.isAdminControlled?Ne.sandboxingControls?.sandboxing==="enabled"&&y()?"Auto-Run Mode Controlled by Team Admin (Sandbox Enabled)":"Auto-Run Mode Controlled by Team Admin":!Ne.isAdminControlled&&e.composerEffectiveAllowlistService.shouldPermissionsFileConstrainUnrestrictedMode()?`Auto-Run Mode (enforced by ~/${e.productService.dataFolderName??".cursor"}/permissions.json)`:"Auto-Run Mode"})
target: se=We(()=>{const Ne=l();return Ne.isDisabledByAdmin?"团队管理员已禁用自动运行模式":Ne.isAdminControlled?Ne.sandboxingControls?.sandboxing==="enabled"&&y()?"团队管理员控制的自动运行模式（已启用沙箱）":"团队管理员控制的自动运行模式":!Ne.isAdminControlled&&e.composerEffectiveAllowlistService.shouldPermissionsFileConstrainUnrestrictedMode()?`自动运行模式（由 ~/${e.productService.dataFolderName??".cursor"}/permissions.json 强制生效）`:"自动运行模式"})

source: return!Ne.isAdminControlled&&e.composerEffectiveAllowlistService.shouldPermissionsFileConstrainUnrestrictedMode()?`Allowlist and approval behavior are set in ~/${e.productService.dataFolderName??".cursor"}/permissions.json. Run Everything is disabled while that file defines allowlists or a restrictive approvalMode.`
target: return!Ne.isAdminControlled&&e.composerEffectiveAllowlistService.shouldPermissionsFileConstrainUnrestrictedMode()?`允许列表和批准行为由 ~/${e.productService.dataFolderName??".cursor"}/permissions.json 配置。当该文件定义了允许列表或限制性的 approvalMode 时，“运行所有内容”将被禁用。`

source: "Choose how Agent runs tools like command execution, MCP, and file writes. With admin-enabled sandboxing, commands auto-run in a secure sandbox. Commands not in the allowlist require approval but can run in sandbox."
target: "选择智能体如何运行命令执行、MCP、文件写入等工具。在管理员启用沙箱时，命令会在安全沙箱中自动运行。不在允许列表中的命令需要批准，但仍可在沙箱中运行。"

source: "Choose how Agent runs tools like command execution, MCP, and file writes. Tools will auto-run in a sandbox if possible. If not, they will respect the allowlist or ask for approval."
target: "选择智能体如何运行命令执行、MCP、文件写入等工具。如果可能，工具会在沙箱中自动运行；否则将遵循允许列表或请求批准。"

source: "Choose how Agent runs tools like command execution, MCP, and file writes. Sandboxing is disabled by your admin."
target: "选择智能体如何运行命令执行、MCP、文件写入等工具。沙箱已被你的管理员禁用。"

source: "Choose how Agent runs tools like command execution, MCP, and file writes."
target: "选择智能体如何运行命令执行、MCP、文件写入等工具。"

source: ye=Ne=>{switch(Ne){case g3.ASK_EVERY_TIME:return"Ask Every Time";case g3.YOLO:return y()?"Auto-Run in Sandbox":"Use Allowlist";case g3.FULL_YOLO:return y()?"Run Everything (Unsandboxed)":"Run Everything";default:return"Ask Every Time"}}
target: ye=Ne=>{switch(Ne){case g3.ASK_EVERY_TIME:return"每次都询问";case g3.YOLO:return y()?"在沙箱中自动运行":"使用允许列表";case g3.FULL_YOLO:return y()?"运行所有内容（不使用沙箱）":"运行所有内容";default:return"每次都询问"}}
